---
title: "updates_template (DO NOT USE AS IS)"
date: yyyy-mm-dd
categories: [Cat1; Cat2; Catetc]
---

Content of the file goes here.

![and the picture footer goes here](here_goes_the_path.jpg)

<!--Leave this part as is-->
[← Return to News Overview](../news.qmd){.btn .btn-orange .btn-sm role="button"}
[← Return to Homepage](../index.qmd){.btn .btn-orange .btn-sm role="button"}
